abilities.name: Field Triage
abilities.text: Once per round, when you stabilize the breach or recover in a sanctuary, you can clear 1 wound and turn panic into procedure.

abilities.name: Scar Ledger
abilities.text: You keep a practical account of harm and treat every survivor like a problem that can still be solved.

abilities.name: Siege Discipline
abilities.text: Long pressure does not break your pace; it sharpens it.

abilities.name: Amber Draught
abilities.text: Relief arrives from your kit in precise doses, never by miracle.
